## What
<!-- What does this PR do? Link the issue: Closes #__ or Resolves #__ -->

## Why
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## How
<!-- Brief technical summary of the approach. Include architectural decisions if significant. -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Check the type that applies to this PR -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvements

## Testing
<!-- Describe the tests you ran and/or added. Provide instructions so others can reproduce. -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Integration tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Cross-browser tested (if UI changes)
- [ ] Mobile responsive (if UI changes)

## Security Checklist
<!-- Ensure your changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities -->
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] Input validation added where needed
- [ ] Authentication/authorization unchanged or properly implemented
- [ ] No sensitive data logged
- [ ] Dependencies checked for vulnerabilities

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff thoroughly
- [ ] No console.log / debug artifacts left in production code
- [ ] TypeScript types added/updated as needed
- [ ] ESLint warnings resolved or justified
- [ ] Updated docs if needed (README, API docs, etc.)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Breaking Changes
<!-- If this is a breaking change, describe what will break and how to migrate -->


## Screenshots / Demo
<!-- If UI changes, add before/after screenshots or video demos -->


## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, concerns, or discussion points for reviewers -->
